CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & CERTIFICATE OF MAILING

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABUNIE, OMAR, A MINOR ABUNIE, AMER, A MINOR ABUNIE, JAMIL, GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINORS ABUNIE, ENAM OMAR, NEMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, JUAN RAMON $2,921.44 PRINCIPAL, $243.06 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,164.50, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFENDANT TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFFS AS FOLLOWS: $1416.22 TO OMAR ABUNIE, $1305.22 TO AMER ABUNIE, AND $200.00 TO ENAM ABUNIE. CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NEMA OMAR IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO THE ABUNIES.
